positiveSignals: lecture workspace resolves destination for render
lecture study tree groups by public category
interactive lecture augmentation is the fallback enrichment path
landing copy exposes Current review and Next action
didactics UX validator reports lecture route passes

brokenMissingRisks.signal: 9 promoted lectures have no raw slide records before interactive ABPath augmentation.
brokenMissingRisks.reviewerInterpretation: The app can still fill these through augmentation, but faculty review should verify they read as complete lectures rather than scaffold cards.

brokenMissingRisks.signal: 12 promoted lectures have no source learning-objective array before augmentation.
brokenMissingRisks.reviewerInterpretation: ABPath augmentation supplies objectives, but the source lecture payload itself does not carry objective parity.

brokenMissingRisks.signal: 11 promoted lectures have no source MCQ/flashcard records before augmentation.
brokenMissingRisks.reviewerInterpretation: Question tabs rely on generated ABPath augmentation unless richer reviewed questions are attached.

brokenMissingRisks.signal: Renal Mass Evaluation carries ABPath contract warning(s).
brokenMissingRisks.reviewerInterpretation: The normalized AP seed currently has stronger medical-kidney/process anchors than renal neoplasm anchors; renal tumor-specific anchors should be added when the source specification is expanded.

brokenMissingRisks.signal: Gynecologic Pathology: Core Principles carries ABPath contract warning(s).
brokenMissingRisks.reviewerInterpretation: The normalized AP source does not currently expose a clean ap_gyn category; this contract is governed by gynecologic path-context filtering and the scope boundary.

brokenMissingRisks.signal: Renal Pathology: Core Principles carries ABPath contract warning(s).
brokenMissingRisks.reviewerInterpretation: The normalized AP seed blends kidney and urothelial/bladder anchors; the lecture contract keeps renal/urologic oncology as the teaching endpoint.

learnerWordingRoutingRisks.signal: Renal Mass Evaluation is contract-covered but warning notes kidney medical-process anchors are stronger than renal neoplasm anchors.
learnerWordingRoutingRisks.correction: Add renal tumor-specific ABPath anchors or visible caveat language before presenting the lecture as a fully tumor-specific board map.

learnerWordingRoutingRisks.signal: Renal Pathology: Core Principles carries a warning that kidney and urothelial/bladder anchors are blended.
learnerWordingRoutingRisks.correction: Separate renal-oncology versus urothelial/bladder routing or make the scope boundary visible in the lecture card.

learnerWordingRoutingRisks.signal: Gynecologic Pathology contract is governed by path-context filtering because the normalized AP source lacks a clean ap_gyn category.
learnerWordingRoutingRisks.correction: Normalize gynecologic AP taxonomy so learner labels and contract source categories agree.

topNextCorrections.action: Resolve the three ABPath contract warnings before promotion language says these lectures are fully source-clean.
Review the nine core-principles lectures with zero raw slides/objectives/questions and decide which should get authored content versus explicit scaffold status.
Keep route labels, card subtitles, and lecture scope boundaries aligned for renal/urologic and gynecologic topics.
Add reviewer-approved image assets where tissue-layer scaffolds are empty or checklist-only.

guardrails: This report does not mutate runtime components or lecture content.
Generated mappings and scaffolds remain reviewer evidence, not automatically promoted teaching truth.
Navigation signals are source-level QA signals; browser-visible proof remains separate unless a browser walkthrough is explicitly run.
